meta.purpose: LLM prompt to generate an Astro static page for OnePlus repair services

constraints.rendering: Static HTML only — zero client-side JavaScript unless explicitly marked as `client:load` island
constraints.styling: Tailwind CSS using semantic design tokens from the provided CSS variables. NEVER use raw color values (no `bg-blue-500`, no `text-white`). Use `bg-primary`, `text-foreground`, `bg-muted`, etc.
constraints.fonts: Inter via Google Fonts, loaded in <head> with `font-display: swap`
constraints.icons: Inline SVG only — no icon library runtime. Copy SVG paths from Lucide (https://lucide.dev). Each icon must have `aria-hidden="true"` and `focusable="false"`.
constraints.images: All `` tags MUST have `alt`, `width`, `height`, and `loading="lazy"` (except hero which uses `loading="eager"`). Use Astro `` component where possible.
constraints.links_internal: Standard `<a href="/path">` — NO client-side router. All internal links must start with `/`.
constraints.links_external: All external `<a>` tags MUST have `target="_blank"` and `rel="noopener noreferrer"`.
constraints.accessibility: All interactive elements must be keyboard-accessible. Use semantic HTML (`<nav>`, `<main>`, `<section>`, `<article>`, `<footer>`). Buttons must have visible focus rings.
constraints.accordions: Use native `<details>` + `<summary>` elements. NO JavaScript accordions.
forbidden: useState, useEffect, or any React hooks
Any content not present in this JSON

page.metaTitle: OnePlus Phone Repair Winnipeg | Screen & Battery Fix | Mobile Tech Lab
page.metaDescription: Premium OnePlus repair in Winnipeg. Screen replacement, Warp Charge port, battery repair for OnePlus 12, 11, Nord & Open. Expert same-day service.
page.heroDescription: From the flagship OnePlus 13 to the innovative OnePlus Open foldable, we provide expert repairs for all OnePlus devices in Winnipeg. Warp Charge issues, screen damage, battery problems – we're your local OnePlus specialists.

services.name: Screen Replacement
services.description: Fluid AMOLED and ProXDR display replacements for OnePlus flagships and Nord series.

services.name: Battery Replacement
services.description: Restore full-day battery life to your OnePlus device.

services.name: Warp Charge Repair
services.description: Warp Charge 80W, SUPERVOOC 100W, and all fast charging port diagnosis and repair.

services.name: Camera Repair
services.description: Hasselblad-tuned camera repairs on OnePlus flagships.

services.name: Speaker Repair
services.description: Fix stereo speakers, earpieces, and Dolby Atmos audio systems.

services.name: Fingerprint Sensor
services.description: In-display fingerprint sensor repairs and calibration.

advantage_pillars.title: OnePlus Experts in Winnipeg
advantage_pillars.description: Specialized knowledge of OnePlus devices including alert slider, Warp Charge, and Hasselblad cameras.

advantage_pillars.title: Quality Parts Sourced
advantage_pillars.description: We maintain supplier relationships for OnePlus parts.

advantage_pillars.title: Fast Charging Specialists
advantage_pillars.description: We diagnose and repair Warp Charge, SUPERVOOC, and all fast charging systems.

advantage_pillars.title: Warranty on Every Repair
advantage_pillars.description: Screen repair warranties vary by part tier (30 days to lifetime). 90-day battery warranty. Lifetime warranty on most other repairs.

model_categories.title: OnePlus Flagship
model_categories.description: Premium OnePlus phones with Hasselblad cameras.

models_description: We repair all OnePlus models including flagship, Nord series, and the OnePlus Open foldable.

pricing_micro_copy.costDriver: OnePlus repair costs vary by model—flagship devices with AMOLED displays cost more than Nord series. OnePlus provides official device support.
pricing_micro_copy.priceShock: Many customers are surprised that OnePlus repairs can cost as much as Samsung or iPhone repairs. iFixit's OnePlus teardowns show how alert slider, Warp Charge circuitry, and curved displays contribute to complexity.
pricing_micro_copy.advisory: If the repair cost doesn't make sense for your device's value, we'll explain alternatives.
pricing_micro_copy.fallback: When repair isn't practical, data recovery is often still possible.

faqs.question: Do you repair OnePlus phones in Winnipeg?
faqs.answer: Yes! We're one of the few repair shops in Winnipeg that specializes in OnePlus devices.

faqs.question: How long does OnePlus screen repair take in Winnipeg?
faqs.answer: Most OnePlus screen replacements are completed same-day, typically within 1-2 hours once parts are available.

faqs.question: Can you fix OnePlus Warp Charge issues?
faqs.answer: Yes, we diagnose and repair Warp Charge, SUPERVOOC, and all fast charging problems.

faqs.question: Do you repair OnePlus Open foldable?
faqs.answer: Yes, we service the OnePlus Open including inner/outer screen repairs, hinge issues, and component replacements.

faqs.question: Are OnePlus parts available in Winnipeg?
faqs.answer: We maintain supplier relationships for OnePlus parts. Common parts are often in stock.

service_area_note: Serving St. Vital, Fort Garry, Garden City, Transcona, and all Winnipeg neighborhoods. Also serving Thompson, MB. Walk-ins welcome or book online.

locations.name: St. Vital Centre
locations.address: 1225 St Mary's Rd, Winnipeg, MB R2M 5E5

validation_checklist: Page has exactly ONE <h1> tag matching the `page.h1` field
All services render with inline SVG icons, not an icon library import
All FAQ items use <details>/<summary>, not JS accordions
All external links have target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'
All three JSON-LD blocks are injected in <head>
No React, Preact, or JSX runtime in the build output
Hero image has loading='eager'; all other images have loading='lazy'
Page renders fully without JavaScript enabled
All color classes use Tailwind semantic tokens (bg-primary, text-foreground, etc.)
Phone links use tel: protocol; SMS links use sms: protocol
Section IDs match table_of_contents entries for anchor navigation
No placeholder content — every string comes from this JSON
